rationale: The synthetic det-check has the original ensures only as the antecedent of `BIG ==> det_set_state_equal`, so prior attempts that bare-assert the two ensures `forall|i|`s fail (an identical sister attempt on `alloc_page_4k_for_new_container.set_state` failed exactly this way). Materialise BIG under `if BIG { ... }`; inside the branch the per-i foralls and the per-field equalities at `index` become hypotheses. Then do a pointwise assert-forall, case-splitting on `i == index` (closed by per-field equalities chained through `pre_self_.page_array@[index]`) vs `i != index` (closed by transitivity through `pre_self_.page_array@[i]`), and lift pointwise `Page` equality to `Seq<Page>` equality via `=~=`.
